description: Letter from a Jerusalem pilgrim writing from Alexandria, admonishing his relatives, who were staying in his house in Fustat, to exercise utmost consideration towards “the lady of the house” (his wife). She had always been an excellent companion to them. Ca. 1160. (Information from Goitein’s index cards) EMS
description_he: מכתב מעולה לרגל מירושלים, מאלכסנדריה, לקרוביו בפוסטאט, בערך 1160. מבקש לכבד את אשתו שנשארה בבית.
